title: User Stats Response Schema
description: Counts per status bucket for the admin Users page tiles. Scoped to the caller's visible users (same intern/id_status/group-access rules as the user list), so `total` equals the unfiltered list's totalCount for the same admin and the tiles always reconcile with the table. Ignores the current search/status/group filters.

data.description: User counts. PRECEDENCE: `blocked` wins over status, so a blocked+invited user is counted under `blocked` only and the buckets are mutually exclusive. NOT EXHAUSTIVE: the userStatus lookup group also contains the legacy `interested` and `auto_created` codes, whose users are counted in `total` but in no bucket — therefore active + invited + blocked <= total. Do not render the tiles as a breakdown that must sum.

total.description: All users visible to the caller

invited.description: Not blocked, status = invited (activation not yet completed)
